enabled.description: Determines if the resource is active or disabled

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource (must be unique)

network_security_group_id.description: References the associated network security group by ID

network_watcher_name.description: Specifies the name of the Network Watcher instance

retention_policy.description: Defines log retention settings (days and enablement)

storage_account_id.description: References the associated storage account by ID

tags.description: Defines metadata as key-value pairs for the resource

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts for CRUD actions

traffic_analytics.description: Configures traffic analytics settings and workspace details
traffic_analytics.type: list(object({enabled: bool,interval_in_minutes: optional(number),workspace_id: string,workspace_region: string,workspace_resource_id: string}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
